case_title: MONA MICHELE MINCEY VS. CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO, ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 71040217) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 7.0 DAYS
NOTICE OF CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE (TRANSACTION ID # 100220064) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MINCEY, MONA MICHELE AN INDIVIDUAL

PROOF OF SERVICE OF RE: STATEMENT OF DAMAGES (TRANSACTION ID # 100222829) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MINCEY, MONA MICHELE AN INDIVIDUAL SERVED DEC-11-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A GOVERMENT ENTITY

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-16-2024 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MATTER IS OFF CALENDAR. THE ZELIDON-ZEPEDA DECLARATION FAILS TO EXPLAIN THE "MEANS" BY WHICH THE PARTIES MET AND CONFERRED IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 430.41. THERE IS NO COMPETENT EVIDENCE SHOWING THAT THE PARTIES MET AND CONFERRED IN PERSON, BY VIDEO CONFERENCE, OR BY TELEPHONE. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH THE CODE. DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY FEBRUARY 16, 2024. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-16-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is off calendar. The Zelidon-Zepeda declaration fails to explain the "means" by which the parties met and conferred in compliance with CCP 430.41. There is no competent evidence showing that the parties met and conferred in person, by video conference, or by telephone. The parties are ordered to comply with the code. Defendant's response to the complaint is now due by February 16, 2024.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
